site.name: Saasany
site.description: Build your AI SaaS product in a weekend

hero.title: Ship Your AI SaaS Product Fast
hero.subtitle: A production-ready Next.js template with authentication, payments, AI integration, and everything you need to launch your SaaS product.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Built with a modern tech stack so you can focus on your product, not your infrastructure.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Secure user authentication with email/password, magic links, and OAuth providers via Better Auth.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Stripe integration for one-time payments and recurring subscriptions with a full billing portal.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Vercel AI SDK pre-configured with streaming chat, completions, and tool-calling support out of the box.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full i18n support with next-intl. Easily add new locales and serve a global audience from day one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A polished, accessible admin dashboard with data tables, charts, and settings pages ready to customize.

seo.title: SEO Ready
seo.description: Metadata API, Open Graph, structured data, and sitemap generation configured so you rank from the start.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Saasany, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

items.account: Account information such as your name and email address when you register
items.usage: Usage data and analytics to improve our service
items.payment: Payment information processed securely through our payment provider

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use the information we collect to:

items.service: Provide, operate, and maintain our services
items.improve: Improve, personalize, and expand our services
items.communicate: Communicate with you about updates, security, and support

share.title: Information Sharing
share.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform, conducting our business, or serving you—so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may also request that we restrict processing of your data or provide you with a copy in a portable format. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the address below.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at <email>privacy@saasany.com</email>.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Saasany. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account or using any part of our service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

use.title: Acceptable Use
use.content: You agree to use Saasany only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe upon the rights of others. You must not:

items.lawful: Use the service for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws
items.noAbuse: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the service or its related systems
items.noInfringe: Infringe upon or violate the intellectual property rights of Saasany or others

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

payment.title: Payments and Billing
payment.content: Paid subscriptions are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. We reserve the right to change our pricing with reasonable notice to current subscribers.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Saasany platform and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Saasany and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The service is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Saasany shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for any reason, including if you violate these Terms of Service. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at <email>legal@saasany.com</email>.
